commands.review_summary:
This PR renames private tool-schema regression fixtures to neutral fuzzplugin/mockplugin names and carries the stacked runtime/doctor quarantine changes for invalid or unreadable tool schemas across embedded attempts, compaction, and doctor checks.

PR surface: Source +381, Tests +474. Total +855 across 22 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main passes raw tools into provider normalization and directly reads descriptor fields, while the branch adds focused tests for unreadable and unsupported schemas. I did not execute tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer landing review, current-base CI, and accepting the compatibility-sensitive quarantine behavior; there is no narrow automated repair target.
